summary: Completed comprehensive RBAC and Notification system testing. Backend: 32/32 tests passed. Frontend: All role-based access controls working correctly. Login, sidebar filtering, and permission-based UI elements all functioning as expected.

features_tested.hr_login: PASS - admin/pass123 redirects to /dashboard with full sidebar (17 items)
features_tested.system_admin_login: PASS - sysadmin/pass123 redirects to /dashboard with limited sidebar (9 items)
features_tested.office_admin_login: PASS - offadmin/pass123 redirects to /dashboard with limited sidebar (8 items)
features_tested.hr_employees_page: PASS - HR sees edit/delete buttons on Employees page
features_tested.system_admin_employees_page: PASS - System Admin sees data but NOT edit/delete buttons
features_tested.office_admin_employees_page: PASS - Office Admin sees data but NOT edit/delete buttons
features_tested.hr_role_management: PASS - HR can access /role-management and see edit role buttons
features_tested.system_admin_role_management: PASS - System Admin can access /role-management but NO edit buttons
features_tested.office_admin_role_management: PASS - Office Admin does NOT see Role Management in sidebar
features_tested.notification_bell: PASS - Notification bell visible for all admin roles
features_tested.notification_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown opens and shows 'No notifications yet' for new users
features_tested.roles_api_users: PASS - GET /api/roles/users returns all users with roles
features_tested.roles_api_update: PASS - PUT /api/roles/users/{id}/role works for HR and System Admin
features_tested.late_requests_hr_buttons: PASS - HR sees Apply for Employee and Approve/Reject buttons
features_tested.late_requests_non_hr_buttons: PASS - Non-HR roles do NOT see Apply/Approve/Reject buttons

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation is well-structured with clear role definitions (ADMIN_ROLES, ALL_ADMIN_ROLES, SYSTEM_ROLES)
Frontend sidebar filtering correctly uses user.role to show/hide nav items
Permission checks are properly implemented on both backend (require_admin, require_any_admin, require_system_admin) and frontend (isHR, canEdit)
Notification system properly integrated with user-specific notifications
Role migration from old roles (super_admin, admin, hr_manager, team_lead) to new roles (hr, system_admin, office_admin, employee) handled in startup seed
seed_data_creation: Admin users (admin, sysadmin, offadmin) seeded on startup with role migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC system fully tested and working. 3 admin roles (HR, System Admin, Office Admin) with proper permission separation. Notification system endpoints working but no notifications exist yet (triggers are in place for employee creation, leave application, etc.). Role Management page allows HR to change user roles. All sidebar items correctly filtered based on user role.
